results.title: Talisker 1988, The Distillers Edition 2001 Bottling
results.description: This rare single malt from the Isle of Skye legend, Talisker, was distilled in 1988 and bottled specially for The Distillers Edition series in 2001.

results.title: Review #2340 - Talisker Distiller's Edition : r/Scotch
results.description: Briny sea air with a pop of toffee, fruits, wine and sweet butter cream. Overall: Talisker knows just how to draw me in and keep me interested.

results.title: Talisker 2001 Distillers Edition
results.description: Very clean and intense, with light smoke soon appearing. Creamy toffee, with fruit acidity. The palate is sweet to start, with smoke and tar abruptly exploding ...

results.title: Talisker Distillers Edition | Whisky Review
results.description: Taliska Distillers Edition belongs to my all-time favorite and this is it. So you immediately get a mouthful.
